name: Qwen-Max-0428
archDisplay: Proprietary Transformer; architecture and parameter count undisclosed. Announced (2024-05-11) as "a larger model" than Qwen1.5-110B, not stated to be built on it
note: Early proprietary Qwen-Max flagship, announced alongside Qwen1.5-110B as Alibaba's larger closed-weight model; entered Chatbot Arena top-10 at launch.

results.notes: Chatbot Arena Elo rating; top-10 on leaderboard at launch

verificationNotes: Fetched qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen-max-0428/ ('Notes on Qwen-Max-0428') directly: confirms release 2024-05-11, MT-Bench 8.96, and Arena Elo 1186 (vs Qwen1.5-110B-Chat's 8.88/1172) both appear verbatim. Corrected an unconfirmed claim: the original record's archDisplay said Qwen-Max-0428 was 'built on the Qwen1.5-110B lineage' — the source only says Alibaba 'released a larger model' alongside Qwen1.5-110B; it never states Qwen-Max-0428 derives from or is built on Qwen1.5-110B's weights/architecture. Reworded archDisplay/note to remove that unsupported lineage claim while keeping params/architecture correctly marked undisclosed. ctxK (32) is not confirmed on any Qwen primary source (only a third-party site) and should be treated as low-confidence.
